message:
fix: remove SQLite type assertion in findReplies, use Storage interface (dolt-test-ruqw)

GetDependentsWithMetadata is on the Storage interface, so call it directly
instead of type-asserting to *sqlite.SQLiteStorage. Removes the slow
GetAllDependencyRecords fallback path that Dolt would have hit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
